About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker Today's data reveals an extremely rare extreme-momentum environment dominated by TNGX, which ranks #1 with a composite score of 97.8—nearly perfect across all three scoring pillars (returns: 98.38, ratios: 97.66, SPY resilience: 97.50). TNGX has delivered staggering returns of 857.95% over one year, 173.9% over six months, and 99.79% over three months, while maintaining all four SMA gates (30/50/100/200 day) and passing 4 of 5 ratio consistency tests. The ratio progression (2.95x weekly-to-daily, 3.39x monthly-to-weekly, 2.23x quarterly-to-monthly) shows smooth, compounding gains across timeframes rather than a single spike. In contrast, LINC (rank 2, score pending) exhibits more moderate returns of 165.64% annually and 79.38% quarterly, with a weaker bad_spy_score of 2.4865 versus TNGX's 1.32, indicating less resilience during market downturns.
